curation.synopsis: When the young and gifted Commander Farsight is chosen to lead a crusade across the Damocles Gulf, the T'au Empire expects an easy reconquest of its lost colonies. With a mighty fleet and weapons beyond anything their foes can muster, failure seems impossible. Yet behind a parade of early victories, Farsight finds enemies he never anticipated: the brutal, uncompromising armies of mankind, the unsettling secrets carried within his own expedition, and a darkness that preys on the certainties of the Greater Good. As the campaign grinds on, his courage, his loyalty, and his very soul are tested to breaking. A rare look at the grim galaxy through xenos eyes, and the making of one of the T'au's greatest and most dangerous heroes.

flags.reason: Roster lists format=novella; Lexicanum and the ~816-rating Goodreads work present Farsight: Crisis of Faith as a full-length novel.
